extension.news:
v1.0.0~beta10 (2026-07-17) - New addon ID, icon, and fanart. Install this version fresh; to keep learned offsets, copy offsets.json from the old addon_data folder to the new one - Learning and applying are now separate toggles: Learn audio offsets stores your adjustments, Apply audio offsets replays stored ones. Both off matches the old pause - The four seek-back toggles merged into one Seek back after selection with a shared seconds slider - Offset change seek-back now fires when an adjustment settles, not only when it is saved - Manage view groups whenever two or more HDR types are stored, each group can be cleared on its own, and HDR10+ is labeled correctly
v1.0.0~beta9 (2026-07-17) - Manage view groups by HDR type when more than 8 offsets are stored: pick a group to browse its entries, Back returns to the group list; rows inside a group lead with the codec - Small collections keep the familiar flat list; Clear all stays on the top level - Notifications no longer vanish when raised during the previous toast's fade-out
extension.summary: Fix lipsync once and Evolved remembers it per stream profile
extension.description: Adjust Kodi's audio offset during playback the way you always have. AOM Evolved remembers the value for that stream's HDR type, audio format, and refresh rate, then re-applies it automatically on every matching playback. Includes seek-back after adjustments, playback notifications, and a management view of everything it has learned.
